title: Decision Process for Using Quantifiers
description: A flowchart that guides the process of selecting and applying universal (∀) and existential (∃) quantifiers to formulate logical statements.
relationships: Determine Statement Scope -> Universal Quantifier (∀) if making a claim about ALL elements in a domain
Determine Statement Scope -> Existential Quantifier (∃) if making a claim about AT LEAST ONE element in a domain
Universal Quantifier (∀) -> Formulate Propositional Function P(x)
Existential Quantifier (∃) -> Formulate Propositional Function P(x)
Formulate Propositional Function P(x) -> Construct Final Statement
